title: Resolve, to Direct the Department of Economic and Community Development to Form a Stakeholder Group to Analyze and Improve Home Repair Funding Programs in the State
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, Apr 30, 2025
last_house_action: 4/10/2025 - Committee on Housing and Economic Development suggested and ordered printed. The Resolve was REFERRED to the Committee on HOUSING AND ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 4/30/2025 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
